chapter_title.ar: باب الصَّلَاةِ فِي ثَوْبٍ وَاحِدٍ وَ الْمَرْأَةِ فِي كَمْ تُصَلِّي وَ صَلَاةِ الْعُرَاةِ وَ التَّوَشُّحِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 59 – The Salāt performed in one piece of cloth, and the woman, how many (clothes) can she pray Salāt in, and a Salāt of the naked, and wearing the scarf

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/303)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/303)
text: لَا بَأْسَ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ أَحَدُكُمْ فِي الثَّوْبِ الْوَاحِدِ وَ إِزَارُهُ مُحَلَّلَةٌ إِنَّ دِينَ مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) حَنِيفٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib, from Ziyad Bin Sowqat,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘There is no problem if one of you were to pray Salāt in the one cloth and his loin cloth is loose. The Religion of Muhammadsaww is faultless’.
en.sarwar: 8. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad, from ibn Mahbub from ibn Ri’ab from Ziyad ibn Suqah who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is not an offense if one of you perform Salah (prayer) in one piece of cloth and his loincloth is not secured; religion of Muhammad, O Allah grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, is upright.’”
